problem_statement.value: Build a modular, AI-ready platform for higher education that combines a UGC-aligned academic job portal, a freelance marketplace for academicians, and a skill-development LMS. The platform must handle fragmented academic hiring workflows, enable freelance income for academicians, and provide verified skill development, all within one integrated system to serve the Indian higher education ecosystem.

user_needs: Find UGC-aligned academic jobs without re-entering profile data
Earn through freelance academic work with escrow-secured payments
Upskill with courses that close employment gaps and link verified skills to profiles
Manage hiring workflows with compliance filters (NET, PhD, API score)
Verify credentials (candidate and institution) for trust
Access AI assistance for CV writing, job descriptions, and course recommendations

risks_to_product_fit: Complexity of three distinct marketplaces (jobs, freelance, LMS) may dilute focus for early users
Manual document verification bottleneck unless automated effectively
Low employer or freelancer adoption if supply/demand is imbalanced at launch
Payment escrow disputes could degrade trust
